title: Capabilities beyond spec: Serie B/C, discovery tools, top-scoring teams, team comparison
evidence: knowledge_graph.py:448 top_scoring_teams, :370 compare_teams; server.py:162-182 list_competitions/list_seasons/list_teams tools
suggestion: None — these exceed the required capability set; noted for cross-run comparison.

title: Sophisticated overlap dedup across 3 Serie A sources protects standings accuracy
evidence: knowledge_graph.py:121 dedupe_matches prefers a complete round-robin season; verified by test_overlapping_sources_do_not_double_count (test_knowledge_graph.py:36)
suggestion: None — surfaced as a quality signal.

title: knowledge_graph.py is a single 627-line module
suggestion: Optionally split match/team/competition/player/stats query families into separate modules to raise maintainability.

title: Lint/code-quality score below clean
evidence: scores.json code_quality=0.6667 (ruff via scorer); not re-run per skill guidance
suggestion: Run ruff to enumerate and resolve remaining warnings.

title: Player position filter requires exact FIFA code, not natural-language role
evidence: knowledge_graph.py:548 position filter uses == position.upper(); spec example 'all forwards from Sao Paulo FC' uses a role word not a code
suggestion: Map role words (forward/defender/midfielder) to FIFA position-code groups. R8 (nationality/club + ratings) is itself fully met — this is beyond-spec polish.
